---
title: "About Me"
image: profilepic.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/leo-yu-0369042ba/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/men0456
---

Replace this text with a short bio about yourself. What are you studying? What are you interested in? What do you want to work on?
